title: Parcel
description: Single parcel record for spatial modeling.

parcel_id.description: Unique parcel identifier such as B-01.

centroid.description: Approximate center point used for labels, height anchors, or generator placement.

parcel_type.description: Parcel category such as primary_core, secondary_tod, tertiary_living, open_space, or special.

notes.description: Human notes about uncertainty, source, or intended use.
